subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant of the Blessed Beauty! With the Most Exalted Pen did He establish a binding Covenant and a mighty Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان جمال مبارک بقلم اعلی عهد وثیقی و میثاق عظیمی تاسیس نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
